[Theory]
[InlineData("DecryptionFailure", "DIA File Processing | Failed to decrypt DIA file - Error Notification")]
[InlineData("D365DataverseSaveFailure", "DIA File Processing | Failed to save decrypted DIA file in D365 Dataverse - Error Notification")]
[InlineData("InvalidEncryptedFileFormat", "DIA File Processing | Invalid encrypted DIA file - Error Notification")]
[InlineData("MissingDiaFileAfter7AmNzt", "DIA File Processing | Missing encrypted DIA file - Error Notification")]
[InlineData("UnknownFailure", "DIA File Processing | UnknownFailure - Error Notification")]
public async Task NotifyFailureAsync_WhenFailureTypeProvided_ShouldUseExpectedEmailSubject(
    string failureType,
    string expectedSubject)
{
    // Arrange
    var loggerMock = new Mock<ILogger<DiaExceptionNotificationService>>();
    var dataverseRepoMock = new Mock<IDataverseRepository>();

    var logId = Guid.NewGuid();
    var queueId = Guid.NewGuid();
    var emailId = Guid.NewGuid();

    dataverseRepoMock
        .Setup(repo => repo.CreateAsync(
            It.Is<Entity>(entity => entity.LogicalName == "tpc_log"),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()))
        .ReturnsAsync(logId);

    var configResults = new EntityCollection(new List<Entity>
    {
        new Entity("tpc_configurationkey")
        {
            ["tpc_name"] = "DIAErrorEmailSender",
            ["tpc_value_singlelinetext"] = "DIA Error Queue"
        },
        new Entity("tpc_configurationkey")
        {
            ["tpc_name"] = "DIAErrorEmailRecipients",
            ["tpc_value_singlelinetext"] = "test1@example.com;test2@example.com"
        }
    });

    dataverseRepoMock
        .Setup(repo => repo.RetrieveMultipleAsync(
            It.Is<QueryExpression>(query => query.EntityName == "tpc_configurationkey"),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()))
        .ReturnsAsync(configResults);

    var queue = new Entity("queue")
    {
        Id = queueId
    };

    var queueResults = new EntityCollection(new List<Entity> { queue });

    dataverseRepoMock
        .Setup(repo => repo.RetrieveMultipleAsync(
            It.Is<QueryExpression>(query => query.EntityName == "queue"),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()))
        .ReturnsAsync(queueResults);

    dataverseRepoMock
        .Setup(repo => repo.CreateAsync(
            It.Is<Entity>(entity => entity.LogicalName == "email"),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()))
        .ReturnsAsync(emailId);

    var service = new DiaExceptionNotificationService(
        loggerMock.Object,
        dataverseRepoMock.Object,
        CreateNotificationOptions());

    var exception = new InvalidOperationException("Test failure");

    // Act
    await service.NotifyFailureAsync(
        "test-file.txt",
        failureType,
        exception,
        CancellationToken.None);

    // Assert
    dataverseRepoMock.Verify(
        repo => repo.CreateAsync(
            It.Is<Entity>(entity =>
                entity.LogicalName == "email" &&
                entity.GetAttributeValue<string>("subject") == expectedSubject),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()),
        Times.Once);
}

Add unit coverage for DIA exception email subject mapping
